keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Trinidad and Tobago 0, Grenada 1. Myles Hippolyte (Grenada) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Noah Powder (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Trinidad and Tobago 0, Grenada 2. Myles Hippolyte (Grenada) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner.
Omar Beckles (Grenada) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  Trinidad and Tobago 1, Grenada 2. Ryan Telfer (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Noah Powder with a through ball   following a fast break.
First Half ends, Trinidad and Tobago 1, Grenada 2.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Andre Rampersad replaces Levi García.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Alvin Jones replaces Noah Powder.
Second Half begins Trinidad and Tobago 1, Grenada 2.
Aubrey David (Trinidad and Tobago) Yellow Card at 64'
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Nathaniel James replaces Ajani Fortune.
Justin García (Trinidad and Tobago) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Trinidad and Tobago 2, Grenada 2. Reon Moore (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ryan Telfer with a headed pass.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Real Gill replaces Shannon Gómez.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Triston Hodge replaces André Raymond.
Substitution, Grenada. Saydrel Lewis replaces Jermaine Francis.
Substitution, Grenada. Keishon Clarke replaces Benjamin Ettienne.
Substitution, Grenada. Steffon Abraham replaces Darius Johnson.
Substitution, Grenada. Jamal Charles replaces Myles Hippolyte.
Substitution, Grenada. Trevon Williams replaces Shavon John-Brown.
Triston Hodge (Trinidad and Tobago) Yellow Card at 97'
Second Half ends, Trinidad and Tobago 2, Grenada 2.
